description_en: Boston may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 34 halal restaurants and 6 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Boston, the United States, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Boston: 69 halal restaurants listed, 6 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.6/5.
